name: delete_rows
description: Delete rows from a Supabase database table that match filter conditions. Always requires a filter to prevent accidental deletion of all rows. Use PostgREST filter operators to precisely target which rows to remove. Can return the deleted rows in the response.

parameters.name: table
parameters.description: The name of the database table to delete from.

parameters.name: column.filter
parameters.description: Filter to select which rows to delete. Uses PostgREST operators (eq, in, lt, etc.). Required to prevent accidental full-table deletion.

parameters.name: Prefer
parameters.description: Set to 'return=representation' to return the deleted row(s) in the response.
